src/main/java/com/tickets/config/WebConf.general_idea: Updated CORS configuration to use `allowedOriginPatterns` instead of `allowedOrigins` to support credentials in Spring Boot 2.4+ and added PATCH method.
Refactored interceptor registration to explicitly exclude static resources, Swagger endpoints, and specific API paths from authentication checks.
Commented out the `ServerEndpointExporter` bean definition, likely due to migration to a container-managed WebSocket setup or Spring Boot 3+ changes.

src/main/java/com/tickets/controller/Fac.general_idea: Replace javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest with jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace changes required by Spring Boot 3.
Replace io.swagger.annotations (Swagger 2) with io.swagger.v3.oas.annotations (OpenAPI 3) to align with SpringDoc OpenAPI used in Spring Boot 3.
Add @Slf4j annotation to enable Lombok-generated logger, replacing manual logging or standard out prints.
Add cn.hutool.core.io.FileUtil import to utilize Hutool for file operations, replacing or supplementing standard Java IO.
Add org.json imports (CDL, JSONException) to handle JSON/CSV parsing, likely replacing or supplementing FastJSON usage.
Add Spring Retry annotations (@Retryable, @Backoff) to enable declarative retry logic for external service calls.
Add Spring HTTP client utilities (InputStreamResource, HttpHeaders, MediaType) to support more complex HTTP request construction.
Clean up and organize imports, removing unused ones (like sun.net.www) and adding necessary Spring Web annotations explicitly.
Inject VenueActiviesService to support new venue-related functionality in the controller.
Implement a new /search endpoint to query venue activities using the injected service.
Implement a new /applet endpoint that triggers a timer task to synchronize data with a WeChat applet backend.
Implement a new /Entryrecord endpoint that triggers a timer task to upload entry records to an external service.
Refactor the /posts endpoint to handle data upload for Jiangmen, including CSV generation and image upload logic.
Implement a new /huiZhouPosts endpoint specifically for uploading face data to the Huizhou government system.
Add a helper method sendSsmUP with @Retryable annotation to handle retries for data uploads.
